prd.oneLiner: Connect traveler profiles, itineraries and quotes, bookings, pre-departure checklists, and consultation performance.
prd.goal: Increase quote-to-booking conversion by 15% and reduce missed pre-departure notices.
prd.whyNow: Traveler preferences, consultations, quotes, bookings, and notices are separated, making tailored proposals and itinerary follow-up difficult.
prd.problem: Traveler preferences, consultations, quotes, bookings, and notices are separated, making tailored proposals and itinerary follow-up difficult.
prd.solution: Connect traveler profiles, itineraries and quotes, bookings, pre-departure checklists, and consultation performance.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Travel consultant managing inquiries and bookings
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Traveler preferences, consultations, quotes, bookings, and notices are separated, making tailored proposals and itinerary follow-up difficult.

targets.name: Travel product and reservation operations coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Traveler preferences, consultations, quotes, bookings, and notices are separated, making tailored proposals and itinerary follow-up difficult.

scenarios.text: Travel consultant managing inquiries and bookings completes travel inquiry and preference capture and checks progress.
Travel product and reservation operations coordinator reviews inquiry-to-booking conversion and product and channel performance reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Increase quote-to-booking conversion by 15% and reduce missed pre-departure notices.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Traveler, itinerary, quote, booking, and follow-up-status lookup
Travel consultation, itinerary proposal, quotation, booking, and pre-departure notice management
Inquiry-to-booking conversion and product and channel performance reporting
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
